description:
## File
src/services/feed_service.cr lines ~139-171

## Problem
Two passes over tabs: URL collection (lines 139-145) then response building (lines 150-171). Structurally necessary because URLs must be collected before the batch count query, but could be combined into a single pass with deferred count lookup.

## Fix
Combine URL collection and response building into a single pass, using a lazy count lookup or pre-computed URL set. Low priority — the current approach is clear and correct.
title: Optimize double tab iteration in feed_service.build_feeds_page
